title: SkyrimNet Plugins Index
description:
Machine-generated aggregate of all plugin manifests. Regenerated by build-index.yml on every push to main. Never edited by humans — PRs that modify index.json are rejected by validate.yml. Contains only fields the dashboard needs to render the browse page, filter, and sort. Anything else (description, external_url, invocation block, full mod metadata) is fetched from the individual plugin's manifest.json on detail view.

Field formatting matches the (relaxed) manifest schema — index entries are permissive on string content because the dashboard is the canonical authoring source.

schema_version.description: Bump when the entry shape changes in a breaking way. Dashboard refuses unknown versions.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last rebuild. Null before the first run.

id.description: Canonical plugin ID derived from the directory path: 'plugins/{author}/{slug}'. The author segment is the SaaS-assigned immutable username (uniqueness + immutability enforced at signup, so paths never collide and never break). The slug is the URL-safe plugin slug.

type.description: Copied from manifest.json. Controls dashboard card rendering (install button vs external-link button) and the 'installable only' filter in browse.

external_url.description: Required for listings, absent for bundles. Mirrored from manifest.external_url so the browse page can render an 'open external' link without fetching the full manifest.

title.description: Copied from manifest.json. Globally unique across the repo (case-insensitive).

tagline.description: Short one-liner shown on browse cards. Copied from manifest.json.

author.description: The author's SaaS-assigned immutable username. Copied from manifest.json. Also forms the author segment of the plugin path.

skyrimnet_version.description: SkyrimNet version this plugin was built against. Copied from manifest.json. Used by the dashboard's 'compatible with my install' filter.

nsfw.description: Copied from manifest.json. Controls whether this plugin is visible in the default (NSFW-off) browse view.

contents.description: Required for bundle plugins. Absent for listing plugins (they have no content files in the repo). File counts derived by walking the plugin directory.

mods.description: Always present (empty array when the plugin has no mod integrations). Includes 'name' for display, 'file' (lowercased) for compatibility matching, and 'required' flag.

name.description: Human-readable mod name for display in browse listings.

file.description: Lowercased plugin or DLL filename. Matched case-insensitively against the user's installed plugin list by the dashboard.

first_published.description: Derived from: git log --reverse --format=%aI -- plugins/{author}/{slug}/ | head -1
